landing.heroSubtitle: Compare the best tailors in your area and get free quotes for your project
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Find the ideal tailor in 3 simple steps
landing.step1Desc: Tell us what you need and we'll contact tailors in your area.
landing.step2Desc: Compare profiles, read reviews and choose the tailor that suits you.
landing.step3Desc: Contact professionals directly and complete your project with confidence.
landing.verifiedProsDesc: All our professionals are selected and verified to guarantee quality service.
landing.authenticReviewsDesc: Read reviews from verified customers to make the best choice.
landing.freeServiceDesc: Our service is completely free for individuals. Get quotes with no obligation.
landing.joinNetwork: Join our network of professionals and grow your business.

auth.testimonialClient: I found an exceptional seamstress for my wedding dress. The process was simple and the result was beautiful!
auth.testimonialPro: Thanks to L'Art de Coudre, I was able to grow my clientele by 40% in just 6 months. The platform is intuitive and the requests are qualified.

measures.title: Take measurements
measures.subtitle: Save your measurements to facilitate orders with tailors
measures.tip2: Measure directly on the body, with light clothing
measures.tip3: Don't pull the tape measure too tight
measures.tip4: Get help if possible for more accuracy
measures.clickToSee: Click on a measurement field to see where to take the measurement on the body
measures.autoShare: Your measurements will be automatically shared with tailors when you place orders
